title: AdventuresHorizons
description: Time for an adventure! - This is my personal, low-res trailer modpack inspired by the Lowresbone Modpack! It aims to recreate the stunning visuals of Minecraft trailers within the vanilla game.
body:
![Description Header :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db5ddcc38cf5c0129af5e3fb1b0e556981c68b90.png)
# AdventuresHorizons - Time for an Adventure!
A modpack inspired by **Lowresbones - Low Res Trailer Recreation Modpack**, my pack adds a variety of visual, gameplay, and performance mods while keeping the vanilla gameplay and iconic style of the official low-res Minecraft trailers!

_**If you love the look of the official Minecraft trailers as much as I do, this is the modpack for you!**_

## Future and goals!
My goal is to create a modpack that makes me enjoy the game again, so I thought I'd share this journey with you through this modpack. I will keep updating it from time to time to fix any mistakes and fine-tune settings until it's perfect!

This is a **BETA** version still.
